text: And now Words and Their Stories from VOA Learning English.
zh: 下面是 VOA 慢速英语的《词汇掌故》。

text: Springtime is a time of renewal and growth.
zh: 春天是万物复苏、生长的时节。

text: Many plants end their long winter sleep and form new buds and shoots.
zh: 许多植物结束漫长的冬眠，长出新芽和新枝。

text: Beautiful flowers will soon be showing their bright colors.
zh: 美丽的花朵很快会绽放出鲜艳的颜色。

text: And the grass will grow thicker and greener again.
zh: 草也会长得更密、更绿。

text: Some flowers bloom in a very noticeable way but that is not the case with grass.
zh: 有些花开得很显眼，但草不是这样。

text: Imagine you are sitting in a grassy field.
zh: 想象你坐在一片草地上。

text: And you have only one job - to watch the grass grow.
zh: 你唯一的工作就是看着草长。

text: That does not sound very interesting.
zh: 听起来没什么意思。

text: In fact, it sounds really boring.
zh: 事实上，听起来很无聊。

text: That idea is what gives us the expression "like watching grass grow." We use this expression to describe an experience that is uninteresting.
zh: 正是这个想法给了我们「像看草长一样」这个说法，用来形容一种无趣的体验。

text: Another good word to describe it is tedious.
zh: 另一个形容它的好词是 tedious（枯燥乏味的）。

text: We use this expression in many situations.
zh: 我们在很多场合都会用到这个说法。

text: Let's hear a few examples: After the politician won his campaign, he gave a two-hour long acceptance speech.
zh: 来听几个例子：那位政客赢得竞选后，发表了长达两小时的胜选演说。

text: Two hours!
zh: 两小时！

text: It was as much fun as watching grass grow.
zh: 简直像看草长一样无聊。

text: I really don't like watching long sports games.
zh: 我真的很不喜欢看漫长的体育比赛。

text: It's like watching grass grow.
zh: 就像看草长一样无聊。

text: Now, grass grows on the ground all the time.
zh: 草一直在地上长。

text: And usually, we don't give it much thought.
zh: 通常我们不会多想它。

text: If you stand in one place for a long time, the grass will continue to grow under your feet.
zh: 如果你在一个地方站很久，草会在你脚下继续长。

text: For people who are always active, always moving, always on-the-go, we can say they don't let grass grow under their feet.
zh: 对于总是很活跃、总在动、总在奔波的人，我们可以说他们「不让草长在脚下」。

text: We can also say beneath their feet.
zh: 我们也可以说 beneath their feet（在脚下）。

text: And sometimes we use this expression as a command.
zh: 有时我们把这个说法当命令用。

text: Let's hear some examples: Don't let the grass grow beneath your feet.
zh: 来听几个例子：别让草长在你脚下。

text: Get back to work.
zh: 回去干活。

text: She certainly doesn't let the grass grow under her feet.
zh: 她显然从不停歇。

text: She's been traveling non-stop for over a year.
zh: 她一年多了一直在旅行。

text: And that's all the time we have for this Words and Their Stories.
zh: 以上就是本期《词汇掌故》的全部内容。

text: Until next time, I'm Anna Matteo.
zh: 下期再见，我是 Anna Matteo。
